text: Spent 4 hours debugging a vector index issue. Root cause: wrong distance metric. The fix took 15 min. Lesson: always verify your similarity function before optimizing anything. Thread below on how to pick the right one for your data.
Watching the subnet validation landscape shift. Key insight: it's no longer about who has the most stake — it's about who provides the most useful compute. Quality over quantity. Thread incoming.

New: Streaming search responses. Get results as they're found — not after the full index scans. Perfect for long-tail queries. Enable with `stream: true` in your API call. Docs → https://docs.desearch.ai/streaming

The compute token economics on Bittensor are getting interesting. Validator rewards shifting toward useful work verification — not just stake weight. This is the direction the network needed. Bullish.
